step_2_image_prompt: Take the persona reference photo as the locked source for the entire daybed flat-lay scene — the rumpled cream waffle-knit blanket with its soft folds and creases, the leopard-print throw pillow at the upper edge, the open hardcover book face-down at the left with its linen-bound spine, the small matte ceramic mug of herbal tea with its thin curl of steam at the upper-right, the dried lavender bundle tied with twine along the lower edge, and the overall three-quarter low-angle composition — all of these must remain faithful to the reference. The Alluvi product is now placed at the center of the composition, resting naturally on the rumpled cream waffle blanket with the soft fabric folds gently pressing against the lower edge of the box, front face angled three-quarters toward the camera so the packaging is clearly visible, the open book to its left, the herbal tea mug to its upper-right, the lavender bundle along its lower edge. The product is approximately 7 inches wide by 3 inches tall, sized realistically relative to the mug, book, and lavender bundle surrounding it. Do not enlarge the product beyond its actual proportions. No hands, no persona, no body parts in frame — this is a flat-lay scene only. The Alluvi product packaging must match the product reference photo exactly — every text element, color, graphic, and certification badge as shown. Preserve the packaging's natural white base color; the scene's warm afternoon light should illuminate the white surface as light, not tint the white amber. Match the lighting direction of the persona scene: soft warm afternoon daylight from the right side of the frame, gentle side-light wash, warm bone tones across the cream blanket, with a soft diffuse shadow cast leftward from the box onto the blanket folds.
